name: kin-smart-ticketing
description: Monorepo para el Sistema KIN Smart Ticketing — Backend API + Desktop Client

scripts.dev: npx -y concurrently -c "blue,magenta" -n "API,DESKTOP" "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/desktop"
scripts.package:linux: npm run build -w apps/desktop && npm run package -w apps/desktop -- --linux

author: Keydiem
